data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram utilizes a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and manage complex dependencies across its platform.
data.technical_spec: Distributed system with interconnected services, each responsible for specific features.

data.title: Graph API
data.description: The Instagram Graph API allows integration and data access for developers, enabling the extension and customization of user experiences.
data.technical_spec: RESTful API with endpoints for managing photos, videos, comments, and user profiles.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Utilizes a CDN to reduce latency and improve content delivery speed by caching photos and videos closer to users geographically.
data.technical_spec: Third-party CDN providers integrated within the app's data flow.

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: Implements sharding to handle massive data volumes efficiently, distributing data across multiple database instances.
data.technical_spec: Partitioning strategy that segments data based on predefined keys, often user IDs.

data.title: Machine Learning Integration
data.description: Machine learning models are utilized to enhance features such as feed ranking, content suggestions, and spam detection.
data.technical_spec: Algorithms processed in distributed clusters using frameworks like TensorFlow and PyTorch.
